# NSURLErrorFailingURLErrorKey

The corresponding value is an NSURL containing the URL which caused a load to fail. This key is only present in the [doc://com.apple.foundation/documentation/Foundation/NSURLErrorDomain].
title: NSURLErrorFailingURLErrorKey
